default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and PSEO initiatives for Airbyte Flex launch](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways
